ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-24-2018 Continued To Mar-07-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Maureen McFadden for Jerry Morks.

Ms. McFadden stated that when her Client was appointed bond was order at $450,000.00, that he could not get bonded for that amount, that she now can get him bonded, that she will file an ex parte petition for limited authority and that she thinks they can close the estate by March. Status on close of estate is continued to March 7, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-13-2017 Continued To Jan-10-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Oct-02-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Maureen McFadden for Darl Lommel.

Ms. McFadden stated that the property will not be sold while it is in the Estate of Susanna and that it will be sold when it is 100% owned by the Beneficiary (Jerry). Ms. McFadden also explained that she started administration of this Estate with Jerry, that she was working with Jerry on closing the Estate, that she did not hear from him for about a year and that she then found out he had a severe medical issue. The Petition for Appointment of Successor Administrator is taken under submission. Status on close of estate is set for December 13, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
